Title: User Authentication
Description: Users can register and log in to the system using email and password.

Title: Task Management
Description: Users can create read update and delete their personal tasks.

Title: Task Filtering & Search
Description: Users can filter and search their task list.

Title: Category Management
Description: Users can organise tasks using custom categories.

Title: User Registration
Description: Allow new users to create an account.
Acceptance Criteria: User can register with username / email / password.

Title: User Login
Description: Allow registered users to log in.
Acceptance Criteria: User receives a JWT token on success.

Title: Task CRUD Operations
Description: Full create-read-update-delete for tasks.
Acceptance Criteria: All four operations work via REST API.

Title: Task Status Toggle
Description: One-click toggle to mark a task as done/undone.
Acceptance Criteria: Checkbox on task card changes status immediately.

Title: Filter Tasks
Description: Filter the task list by status and priority.
Acceptance Criteria: Dropdowns in sidebar filter the task list in real time.

Title: Search Tasks
Description: Keyword search on task titles.
Acceptance Criteria: Search box filters tasks with 300 ms debounce.

Title: Manage Categories
Description: Create and delete user-defined categories.
Acceptance Criteria: Categories appear in sidebar and in task form dropdowns.

Title: Assign Category to Task
Description: Link a category to a task.
Acceptance Criteria: Category name shown on task card.

Title: Register with valid credentials
Description: As a new user I want to register with username / email / password so that I can log in later.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Registration form accepts username, email, password
- Password must be at least 6 characters
- Success redirects to dashboard
- Duplicate email shows error

Title: Prevent duplicate registration
Description: As a user I want the system to reject duplicate email/username so that accounts are unique.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Duplicate email returns HTTP 409
- Duplicate username returns HTTP 409
- Error message is shown in UI

Title: Login with valid credentials
Description: As a registered user I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my tasks.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Correct credentials return JWT token
- Token stored in localStorage
- Redirect to dashboard on success

Title: Reject invalid login
Description: As a user I want the system to reject wrong credentials so that my account is secure.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Wrong password returns HTTP 401
- Non-existent email returns HTTP 401
- Error message shown in UI

Title: Logout
Description: As a user I want to log out so that my session is cleared.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Logout button visible in navbar
- Clicking logout clears localStorage and redirects to login

Title: Create a task
Description: As a user I want to create a task with title, description, priority, and due date.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Title is required
- Status defaults to 'To Do'
- Priority defaults to 'Medium'
- New task appears at top of list

Title: View all my tasks
Description: As a user I want to see all my tasks listed on the dashboard.
Acceptance Criteria:
- All tasks shown ordered by creation date desc
- Each card shows title, status badge, priority badge
- Stats row shows counts

Title: Edit a task
Description: As a user I want to edit any field of an existing task.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking task card opens edit modal pre-filled
- All fields are editable
- Save updates the task and refreshes list

Title: Delete a task
Description: As a user I want to delete a task I no longer need.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Delete button in edit modal
- Confirmation required before deleting
- Task removed from list after delete

Title: Mark task as done
Description: As a user I want to toggle a task's status to done with one click.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Checkbox on task card
- Clicking changes status between todo and done
- Visual strikethrough applied to done tasks

Title: Filter by status
Description: As a user I want to filter tasks by status to focus on what matters.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Status dropdown in sidebar
- Selecting status calls API with ?status= param
- Empty state shown when no tasks match

Title: Filter by priority
Description: As a user I want to filter tasks by priority level.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Priority dropdown in sidebar
- Selecting priority calls API with ?priority= param

Title: Search tasks by title
Description: As a user I want to search tasks by keyword so I can quickly find a specific task.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Search box at top of content area
- Debounced 300 ms after user stops typing
- Calls API with ?search= param

Title: Create a category
Description: As a user I want to create a named category to group tasks.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Category name input + Add button in sidebar
- Empty name rejected
- New category appears in sidebar list and form dropdowns

Title: Delete a category
Description: As a user I want to delete a category I no longer need.
Acceptance Criteria:
- × button next to each category in sidebar
- Deleted category cleared from tasks (ON DELETE SET NULL)
- Dropdowns updated immediately

Title: Assign category to task
Description: As a user I want to assign a category to a task during creation or editing.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Category dropdown in task modal
- Category name shown as badge on task card
- Can be changed to None

Title: Set up Node.js Express project
Description: Initialize package.json and install dependencies (express / better-sqlite3 / bcryptjs / jsonwebtoken / cors).

Title: Create SQLite database schema
Description: Write database.js with users / categories / tasks tables and foreign key constraints.

Title: Implement auth routes
Description: Create routes/auth.js with POST /register and POST /login.

Title: Implement JWT middleware
Description: Create middleware/authMiddleware.js to verify Bearer tokens.

Title: Implement task routes
Description: Create routes/tasks.js with GET / POST / PUT / DELETE endpoints.

Title: Implement category routes
Description: Create routes/categories.js with GET / POST / DELETE endpoints.

Title: Build login HTML page
Description: Create frontend/index.html with login form and error display.

Title: Build register HTML page
Description: Create frontend/register.html with registration form.

Title: Build dashboard HTML page
Description: Create frontend/dashboard.html with sidebar / content layout / task modal.

Title: Write CSS styles
Description: Create frontend/css/style.css with responsive layout.

Title: Write JavaScript – api.js
Description: Create frontend/js/api.js with fetch wrapper for all backend endpoints.

Title: Write JavaScript – dashboard.js
Description: Create frontend/js/dashboard.js for task and category rendering and interactions.

Title: Write unit tests – auth
Description: Write tests/auth.test.js covering register and login edge cases.

Title: Write unit tests – tasks
Description: Write tests/tasks.test.js covering CRUD and filter operations.

Title: TC-01: Register with valid data
Description: Verify that a new user can register with valid unique credentials.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/register with {username:alice,email:alice@test.com,password:secret123}; Expected: HTTP 201, body contains token and username

Title: TC-02: Register with missing fields
Description: Verify that registration fails when required fields are absent.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/register with {username:alice}; Expected: HTTP 400, body contains error

Title: TC-03: Register with short password
Description: Verify that registration fails when password is shorter than 6 characters.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/register with password=123; Expected: HTTP 400

Title: TC-04: Register with duplicate email
Description: Verify that registration rejects a duplicate email.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Register alice@test.com twice; Expected: second call returns HTTP 409

Title: TC-05: Login with valid credentials
Description: Verify that an existing user can log in.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/login with correct email and password; Expected: HTTP 200, token in response

Title: TC-06: Login with wrong password
Description: Verify that login fails with an incorrect password.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/login with wrong password; Expected: HTTP 401

Title: TC-07: Login with unknown email
Description: Verify that login fails for a non-existent email.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/auth/login with ghost@test.com; Expected: HTTP 401

Title: TC-08: Create task with valid title
Description: Verify that an authenticated user can create a task.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/tasks with {title:Buy milk}; Expected: HTTP 201, task in response with status=todo

Title: TC-09: Create task without title
Description: Verify that task creation fails without a title.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/tasks with {} ; Expected: HTTP 400

Title: TC-10: Create task without auth
Description: Verify that unauthenticated task creation is rejected.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: POST /api/tasks without Authorization header; Expected: HTTP 401

Title: TC-11: Get all tasks
Description: Verify that all tasks for the user are returned.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Create 2 tasks, GET /api/tasks; Expected: HTTP 200, array length 2

Title: TC-12: Filter tasks by status
Description: Verify that status filter returns only matching tasks.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Create tasks with different statuses, GET /api/tasks?status=done; Expected: only done tasks returned

Title: TC-13: Filter tasks by priority
Description: Verify that priority filter works.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Create tasks with different priorities, GET /api/tasks?priority=high; Expected: only high tasks returned

Title: TC-14: Search tasks by title
Description: Verify that search returns tasks matching the keyword.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Create tasks with different titles, GET /api/tasks?search=milk; Expected: only matching task returned

Title: TC-15: Update task
Description: Verify that a task can be updated.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: PUT /api/tasks/:id with {title:Updated,status:done}; Expected: HTTP 200, updated fields reflected

Title: TC-16: Update non-existent task
Description: Verify that updating a missing task returns 404.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: PUT /api/tasks/99999; Expected: HTTP 404

Title: TC-17: Delete task
Description: Verify that a task can be deleted.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: DELETE /api/tasks/:id; Expected: HTTP 200

Title: TC-18: Delete same task twice
Description: Verify that second delete returns 404.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: DELETE /api/tasks/:id twice; Expected: second call returns HTTP 404

Title: TC-19: Cannot delete another user's task
Description: Verify cross-user task isolation.
Acceptance Criteria: Steps: Create task as user A, attempt DELETE as user B; Expected: HTTP 404
